creator: khera@kcilink.com
text:
>>>>> "CK" == Chris Knight <chris@aims.com.au> writes:

CK> Howdy,
CK> Well, I'm unable to get either rdesktop or rdesktop-devel to omit the run
CK> dependency on X. The run dependency on X is always generated. Also, the
CK> ports index file (/usr/ports/INDEX) in the FreeBSD CVS repository has always
CK> listed X as a run dependency. I can't help thinking that the problem you
CK> have is due to a local change.

Ok... but I don't change anything out of the ordinary -- only mods are
to /etc/rc.conf and /etc/make.conf to specify SUPFILEs.

Must be something else wrong with this machine, then, or perhaps a
'portupgrade' issue.

Close out the report, then, I suppose.

Thansk.
